audit_items.proof_trace: The callback at line 449 has no try/catch wrapper, so any revert from `auctionCallback` propagates upward and rolls back the entire transaction including the `s_entered = true` write at line 418. EVM atomicity guarantees `s_entered` reverts to false, leaving the reentrancy guard unlocked for future bids. Grep confirms no other write path to `s_entered` exists.
